title: zehneria keayana
intro: Zehneria keayana, also known as Keay's creeping cucumber, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Zehneria keayana are typically made from the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
